creator: kiesel@schlund.de
text:
Hello,

in general, I approve this, with the condition that all dependent ports
(see
http://www.freshports.org/search.php?stype=depends_all&method=match&query=freetds&num=100&orderby=category&orderbyupdown=asc&search=Search) will be checked whether their dependency information must be fixed due to the bump of the library version.

At least a note in /usr/ports/UPDATING should be made with upgrade
instructions for users of ports depending on FreeTDS.

Thanks,
-Alex
